start.content: The fight was exhausting you thing while you search for a resting place. After the bossfight you realy can get a cup of sleep.

options.displayText: go to the small door across the arena

statue.content: You look at the statue and see a green briken statue. You can identify an old Men in its state. It was Probably a King you thing while you see a stine tablet nearby.

options.displayText: go to the small door across the arena

tablet.content: You can identify some letters but cannot make any sense on the meaning

options.displayText: go to the small door across the arena

door.content: You open the door and see a treasure Chest in the other site of the small room you strped into.

rest.content: you lay in the corner and close your eyes. In the meantime the room teleports you back to the entrence of the Labyrinth you were several days in.

chest.content: You Open the chest and you find a notebook. You takeit with you. In the meantime the room teleports you back to the entrence of the Labyrinth you were several days in.

title: The Artefact
description: A short story about the end of a Jorney
author: Erik Matschke
